sections.title: After Heart of Darkness and before the release of The Final Dawn

lines.speaker: Servius, Teokan of Ralos
lines.text: Nilsal, my child. I imagine you're hoping for word on our plans for rescuing Itzla. I'm afraid nothing has been decided yet, but once that changes, I am sure you will have a part to play.

lines.speaker: Servius, Teokan of Ralos
lines.text: Do not lose heart, my child. May the sun light your way.
